name: ledgerline
description: Agent-native composition with explicit MusicXML/MIDI authorship, orchestration, performance control, rendering, and review.

interface.shortDescription: Compose, orchestrate, render, and review music
interface.longDescription: LedgerLine gives Codex a strict agent-authored score language and local tools for MusicXML, MIDI, expression controls, multi-staff notation, virtual-instrument rendering, mixing, and objective review.
defaultPrompt: Ask me for a musical direction, then compose a playable LedgerLine piece.
Orchestrate my sketch and render a reviewable audio draft.
Inspect this LedgerLine score and improve its expression without silent rewrites.
